data.title: Tokenized U.S. Treasury Bonds Surge to $4.07 Billion
data.description: According to PANews, data from RWA.xyz reveals that the value of tokenized U.S. Treasury bonds has surged to $4.07 billion, marking an increase of $1.57 billion over the past 103 days. The Hashnote Short-Term Yield Coin (USYC) holds the largest market capitalization among these assets. Since November 26 of last year, USYC's market cap has risen by $461.2 million, climbing from $495.07 million to $956.27 million.

data.title: $VON rose above 0.0002U, with the highest increase reaching 328.95%; $PWEASE rose above 0.039U, with the highest increase reaching 879.9%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News LBank market shows: $VON rose above 0.0002U, and is now quoted at 0.0002793U, with a 24-hour increase of X%. Since its launch on LBank, the highest increase has reached 328.95%, and the current market value is about 68 million US dollars.
At the same time, $PWEASE rose above 0.039U, and is now quoted at 0.036699U, with a 24-hour increase of X%. Since its launch on LBank, the highest increase has reached 879.9%, and the current market value is about 36 million US dollars.

data.title: Planet Lunch News
Bitcoin's Potential Decline Amid Federal Reserve Rate Decisions
data.description: According to PANews, network economist Timothy Peterson has issued a warning regarding the potential impact of the Federal Reserve's interest rate decisions on the broader market and Bitcoin. Peterson suggests that if the Federal Reserve delays interest rate cuts in 2025, it could lead to a wider market downturn, potentially pulling Bitcoin back to $70,000. His analysis model indicates that Bitcoin might bottom out at $57,000 in the next bear market. However, Peterson considers this scenario unlikely due to the high number of investors closely monitoring Bitcoin.

Solana is forming a broadening wedge on the charts, with the same hinting at an uptick in volatility.

data.title: A HYPE whale added another $600,000 to its position, bringing its overall position loss to $1.39 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to OnchainLens monitoring, a whale transferred $600,000 USDC to HyperLiquid to continue to increase its HYPE position.
Data shows that the whale has previously invested $7.01 million to purchase 362,813 HYPEs at an average price of $19.34, and currently has a floating loss of $1.39 million. In addition, it also holds HyperLiquid ecological tokens PURR (floating loss of $75,000), FUN (floating loss of $26,000) and PIP (floating loss of $15,000), and the overall position is still in a loss state.

data.title: Bitcoin Price Drops as 10-Year & 5-Year BIR Fall, What It Means?
data.description:
Bitcoin price stabilized at $86,400 following market volatility as miner reserves kept growing, which indicates changing market patterns. Bitcoin miners currently hold 1.8111 million BTC, which demonstrates their belief that prices will continue to increase. At the same time, the number of Bitcoin whale wallets currently holds their lowest value since 2019 despite Bitcoin surpassing […]

source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/03/08/bitcoin-price-drops-as-10-year-5-year-bir-fall-what-it-means/

data.title: Mysten Labs announces acquisition of game development platform Parasol
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Mysten Labs, the development company behind Sui, announced the acquisition of game development platform Parasol. The specific acquisition amount has not been disclosed. Parasol is an end-to-end platform that enables game developers to integrate blockchain infrastructure into their games.

data.title: Conic Finance of Curve Finance ecosystem announced that it would stop operating and LPs should withdraw funds as soon as possible
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Curve Ecosystem Omnipools Protocol Conic Finance issued a statement announcing the official cessation of operations and the project will be terminated completely.
Conic Finance stated that due to the failure to resolve key issues in the new version, several core members left during the period, and the remaining team decided to terminate the project after evaluation. The official recommendation is that all liquidity providers (LPs) withdraw funds from Omnipools as soon as possible.
In addition, the Conic Treasury will return the remaining portion of Michael Egorov's investment in July 2023 to him and stop all Votium bribes and incentives for the CNC/ETH Curve pool.

data.title: Author of "Rich Dad Poor Dad": The stock market crash crisis has arrived, and it is recommended to invest in real Bitcoin, gold and silver
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Robert Kiyosaki, author of Rich Dad Poor Dad, posted on the X platform that he predicted the biggest stock market crash in his 2014 book Rich Dad Prophecy, but unfortunately, the crisis has already arrived, which may ruin the future of millions of baby boomers.
And individuals can only start by investing in and holding real gold, silver and Bitcoin to defeat this corrupt and criminal currency Ponzi scheme. But he emphasized that he would never buy gold, silver or Bitcoin ETFs, and believed that ETFs were fake like the US dollar and US bonds.
